stemHtml: Shortly before landing the Co-Pilot reports feeling unwell and becomes incapacitated. The aircraft lands safely. How and when should the event be reported, according to Regulation (EU) No. 996/2010?

options.a: In a voluntary occurrence report, to the national Civil Aviation Authority, within 72 hours.
options.b: As a serious incident, to the national Civil Aviation Safety Investigation Authority, WITHOUT delay.
options.c: In a mandatory occurrence report, to the national Civil Aviation Authority, within 72 hours.
options.d: As an accident, to the national Civil Aviation Safety Investigation Authority, WITHOUT delay.
